## Type of change

<!-- Please add a label to the PR for versioning: "major", "minor", or "patch" -->
<!-- If not specified, a "patch" version bump will be applied by default -->

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue) - **patch**
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality) - **minor**
- [ ] Breaking change (causes existing functionality to change) - **major**
- [ ] This change requires a documentation update

## Checklist

- [ ] I have added appropriate PR label for versioning (major/minor/patch)
- [ ] My code follows the style guidelines of this project
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works
- [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally with my changes
